title: 1. Designing unit tests for custom tools

blocks.content: Agent tests are divided into tool function verification and orchestration flow verification. Unit testing your tool functions ensures bugs in your backend logic are caught independently of the LLM.

Question 1: Why test tool functions separately from the main agent routing logic?
- A) The LLM requires compiled Python binaries.
- B) It isolates programmatic logic bugs from stochastic LLM behavior.
- C) It avoids OAuth verification procedures.

Feedback: Option B is correct. Unit testing tools isolates system bugs from LLM randomness.
